calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-16-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: THURSDAY, FEB-16-2017, 10:10 A.M.: THE CAUSE COMES ON CALENDAR THIS MORNING FOR SMALL CLAIM APPEAL WITH THE COURT, COURT STAFF AND BOTH PARTIES PRESENT IN THE COURTROOM. THE COURT THEN ENTERTAINS STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY OTH SIDES WITH REGARD TO HE CAUSE, ALL OFF THE RECORD. BOTH APPELLENT/DEFENDANT MR. CHINEDU CHUKU AND RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF MS. LENA GHAMRAWI ADDRESS THE COURT AND PRESENT/AND/OR PRESENT DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE FOR THE COURT'S READING AND REVIEW.
AFTER HEARING ALL TESTIMONY PRESENTED AND AFTER REVIEWING DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED TO THE COURT, THE COURT THEREUPON TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

PRO TEM JUDGE: DIANA B. KRUZE; CLERK: MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 525).

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-13-2017 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-01-2016 Judgment Entered
